mapper.select: select * from mail where receiverId = #{receiverId, jdbcType = BIGINT}
select * from mail where receiveTime <= #{receiveTime, jdbcType = BIGINT}
mapper.insert: insert into mail (type, mailId, receiveTime, sender, receiverId, isRead, hasAttachment, isAttachReceived, mailData,readTable,source) values ( #{type, jdbcType = INTEGER}, #{mailId, jdbcType = BIGINT}, #{receiveTime, jdbcType = BIGINT}, #{sender, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{receiverId, jdbcType = BIGINT}, #{isRead, jdbcType = TINYINT}, #{hasAttachment, jdbcType = TINYINT}, #{isAttachReceived, jdbcType = TINYINT}, #{mailData, jdbcType = LONGVARCHAR}, #{readTable, jdbcType = TINYINT}, #{source, jdbcType = INTEGER} )
mapper.update: update mail set type = #{type, jdbcType = INTEGER}, receiveTime = #{receiveTime, jdbcType = BIGINT}, sender = #{sender, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, receiverId = #{receiverId, jdbcType = BIGINT}, isRead = #{isRead, jdbcType = TINYINT}, hasAttachment = #{hasAttachment, jdbcType = TINYINT}, isAttachReceived = #{isAttachReceived, jdbcType = TINYINT}, mailData = #{mailData, jdbcType = LONGVARCHAR} where mailId = #{mailId, jdbcType = BIGINT}
mapper.delete: delete from mail where mailId = #{mailId, jdbcType = BIGINT}
delete from mail where receiverId = #{receiverId, jdbcType = BIGINT}
